name: Feature request

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who is affected? -->

## Proposed Change

<!-- Describe the proposed addition or change. If it touches an accepted ADR or a tool contract, call that out. -->

## Alignment with Project Direction

This project is positioned as a direct `azd` template candidate with a
zero-trust, read-only v1 posture (see [docs/vision.md](../../docs/vision.md)
and [docs/open-questions.md](../../docs/open-questions.md)).

- [ ] My request preserves that positioning
- [ ] My request would change an accepted decision (please reference the ADR)
- [ ] My request adds a new tool (please reference the proposed contract)
- [ ] My request improves deployment, observability, or documentation

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- What other approaches did you weigh? Why is the proposed one preferred? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Links to related issues, ADRs, external benchmarks, or prior art. -->
